title: NormalizedObservation
description: A normalized observation produced from a raw document, capturing structured event data without sentiment or signal scoring.

source_id.description: Identifies the source contract that produced the raw document.

document_id.description: Reference to the RawDocument from which this observation was derived.

normalized_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this observation was created.

data.description: Structured payload of the observation. Schema varies by event_type.

chains.description: Blockchain chain identifiers this observation is relevant to.

tokens.description: Token symbols or addresses mentioned in the observation.

entities.description: Named entities (organizations, individuals, DAOs) extracted from the source.

confidence.description: Confidence score (0..1) of the extraction accuracy.

tags.description: Arbitrary classification tags applied to this observation.
